utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes these 7 fields. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: specified as 'Prague, Czech Republic' – complete. 2) travel_dates: 'September 25-29, 2024' – specific dates given – complete. 3) transportation: has type 'Flight', details 'Round-trip Economy Class ticket with a Budget Airline' and cost '€145' – flight details are generic (no airline name/flight times), but the format only requires 'flight details with costs' and a cost is provided; minimal details present – accept as complete. 4) accommodation: name 'Adventure Lodge', details '4-night stay from September 25 to September 29', cost '€220' – complete. 5) activities: one activity with name, details, cost – included; the format does not require multiple, just selected activities with costs – complete. 6) additional_services: 'None' – acceptable. 7) total_budget: has 'total_booked_cost' and 'remaining_for_spending' – a breakdown is present, albeit minimal; still a complete cost breakdown field is provided. Therefore all 7 items are included and sufficiently specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Prague, Czech Republic), a transportation type (Budget Airline, Economy Class), an accommodation (Adventure Lodge), and one activity (Hiking Expedition).
